title: Integration w/ Vidyard?

posts.author: jpeezah (Jeff Lever)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m new to monday, and we’re just getting started w/ integrations. I’ve received a few emails from vidyard which looks like an excellent marketing tool - they basically add a simple, customized video introduction to their emails.

I know monday.com allows me to save videos as one of the column types, and was wondering if monday would allow me to send emails in a similar fashion or if there was some type of integration w/ vidyard (now or in the future)?

Thanks!
